in_app_notifications_principal_unread_id.name: in_app_notifications_principal_unread_idx
in_app_notifications_principal_unread_id.where: read_at IS NULL AND archived_at IS NULL

contacts_email_idx.name: contacts_email_idx
contacts_email_idx.where: email IS NOT NULL AND archived_at IS NULL

ticket_participants_one_subject.name: ticket_participants_one_subject
ticket_participants_one_subject.value: (principal_id IS NOT NULL)::int + (contact_id IS NOT NULL)::int = 1

inbox_channels_kind_external_id_idx.name: inbox_channels_kind_external_id_idx
inbox_channels_kind_external_id_idx.where: external_id IS NOT NULL AND archived_at IS NULL

sla_policies_workspace_no_scope.name: sla_policies_workspace_no_scope
sla_policies_workspace_no_scope.value: (scope <> 'workspace') OR (scope_team_id IS NULL AND scope_inbox_id IS NULL)
